nl_prompt: How many customers are from Canada?

postgres: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.customers WHERE country = 'Canada'

nl_prompt: What is the total amount spent by customer John Doe?

postgres: SELECT SUM(O.total_amount) FROM public.orders O JOIN public.customers C ON O.customer_id = C.customer_id WHERE C.full_name = 'John Doe'

nl_prompt: List the 5 most expensive products in the Electronics category.

postgres: SELECT product_id, name, price FROM public.products WHERE category = 'Electronics' ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 5

nl_prompt: Show the names of products that have been ordered more than 10 times in total quantity.

postgres: SELECT P.name, SUM(OI.quantity) AS total_ordered FROM public.products P JOIN public.order_items OI ON P.product_id = OI.product_id GROUP BY P.product_id, P.name HAVING SUM(OI.quantity) > 10

nl_prompt: What is the total quantity of SuperWidget purchased by customers in Seattle?

postgres: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(OI.quantity), 0) FROM public.order_items OI JOIN public.products P ON OI.product_id = P.product_id JOIN public.orders O ON OI.order_id = O.order_id JOIN public.customers C ON O.customer_id = C.customer_id WHERE P.name = 'SuperWidget' AND C.city = 'Seattle'
